title: THE Performance Pack
description: The performance modpack that helps with the performance using well-known and not well-known performance mods.
body:
THE Performance Pack is a mod pack created by two friends for people who want better performance, running shaders, or playing Modded Minecraft. THE Performance Pack includes 50 mods and that's our limit. If there is any problems, contact the mod developers.

Mods Includes: Sodium, Essenital, Lithum, Freecam, and more.

Official Server: [https://discord.gg/weGBkPvM5m](https://discord.gg/weGBkPvM5m)![Mods listed on the Modrinth App](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6845410e87829d853ac7369c1a075310af495848.png)

1.21.5 is now supported!


(Lite version coming soon)
